text:
(In reply to Ruslan Makhmatkhanov from comment #3)
That happened when trying to build for RELEASE-12.0.
Because of multiple problems related to OpenSSL at that time I went back to RELEASE-11.2 from backup. Therefore logs no not exist anymore.

So problem might be possibly not related this port. Closing.
